fields.name: body
fields.label: Body Content (Markdown - use instead of blocks for simple pages)
fields.description: For simple text pages, use this field. For complex layouts with components, use Page Blocks below.

fields.name: primaryButtonProductId
fields.label: Primary Button Product ID (if Add to Basket)

fields.name: secondaryButtonProductId
fields.label: Secondary Button Product ID (if Add to Basket)

fields.name: focalPoint
fields.label: Focal Point
fields.description: Where to focus the image (for cropping)

fields.name: slug
fields.label: Service Slug
fields.description: The URL slug to match against Semble products

fields.name: highlightColumn
fields.label: Highlight Column Index (0-based)
fields.description: Which column to highlight (e.g., 1 for second column)

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
